description: Letter addressed to the Nagid Mevorakh about irregularities and inefficiency in the administration of the synagogue of the Iraqians in Fustat. The writer especially complains about the beadle of the synagogue. Dated ca. 1105. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 83, 85 and from Goitein's index cards.) See AIU VII.A.17 (PGPID 6175).
